<!DOCTYPE html>  
<html lang="en">  
<head>  
<meta charset="UTF-8">  
<meta name="viewport"  
content="width=device-width,  
initial-scale=1.0">  
<title>Happy Birthday Dr.  
Sanyogita </title>  
<style>  
@import  
url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/  
css2?  
family=Dancing+Script:wght@700  
&family=Poppins:wght@300;400;  
600&display=swap');  
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-  
sizing: border-box; -webkit-tap-  
highlight-color: transparent; }  
body { font-family: 'Poppins', sans-  
serif; background: linear-  
gradient(-45deg, #ff758c, #ff7eb3,  
#efd5ff, #c1dfc4, #b5e2fa);  
background-size: 400% 400%;  
animation: gradientBG 15s ease  
inﬁnite; min-height: 100vh;  
display: ﬂex; justify-content:  
center; align-items: center;  
overﬂow: hidden; color: #2c3e50;  
}
@keyframes gradientBG { 0% {  
background-position: 0% 50%; }  
50% { background-position: 100%  
50%; } 100% { background-  
position: 0% 50%; } }  
#canvas-container { position:  
absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width:  
100%; height: 100%; pointer-  
events: none; z-index: 1; }  
.screen { position: absolute; width:  
90%; max-width: 450px;  
background: rgba(255, 255, 255,  
0.4); backdrop-ﬁlter: blur(20px); -  
webkit-backdrop-ﬁlter:  
blur(20px); border-radius: 24px;  
border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255,  
255, 0.6); box-shadow: 0 12px 32px  
rgba(255, 117, 140, 0.2); padding:  
35px 25px; text-align: center;  
display: none; opacity: 0;  
transform: scale(0.9); transition:  
opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s  
ease; z-index: 10; pointer-events:  
none; }  
.screen.active { display: block;  
opacity: 1; transform: scale(1);  
pointer-events: auto; }  
h1, h2 { font-family: 'Dancing  
Script', cursive; font-size: 2.5rem;  
color: #d63384; margin-bottom:  
15px; text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px  
rgba(0,0,0,0.05); }  
p { font-size: 1.05rem; line-height:  
1.6; margin-bottom: 25px; color:  
#4a5568; font-weight: 400; }  
.btn-container { display: ﬂex; ﬂex-  
direction: column; gap: 15px;  
justify-content: center; align-  
items: center; width: 100%;  
margin-top: 20px; }  
.btn-row { display: ﬂex; gap: 15px;  
width: 100%; justify-content:  
center; }  
.btn { padding: 14px 28px; font-  
size: 1rem; font-weight: 600;  
border: none; border-radius: 50px;  
cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s  
cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32,  
1.275); background: white; color:  
#ff5e7e; box-shadow: 0 4px 15px  
rgba(255, 94, 126, 0.2); border: 1px  
solid rgba(255, 94, 126, 0.2);  
display: inline-ﬂex; align-items:  
center; justify-content: center;  
text-decoration: none; outline:  
none; }  
.btn:hover { transform:  
translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0  
8px 20px rgba(255, 94, 126, 0.4);  
background: #ff5e7e; color: white;  
}
.btn-primary { background:  
#ff5e7e; color: white; border:  
none; }  
.btn-primary:hover { background:  
#ff416c; box-shadow: 0 8px 20px  
rgba(255, 65, 108, 0.4); }  
#btn-no-playful { position:  
relative; transition: all 0.4s ease;  
white-space: nowrap; }  
.spinner { width: 50px; height:  
50px; border: 5px solid rgba(255,  
94, 126, 0.2); border-top-color:  
#ff5e7e; border-radius: 50%;  
animation: spin 1s linear inﬁnite;  
margin: 0 auto 25px auto; }  
@keyframes spin { to { transform:  
rotate(360deg); } }  
.searching-text { font-size: 1.1rem;  
font-weight: 600; color: #ff5e7e;  
letter-spacing: 1px; animation:  
pulse 1.5s inﬁnite; }  
@keyframes pulse { 0%, 100% {  
opacity: 0.6; } 50% { opacity: 1; } }  
.detected-badge { display: inline-  
block; background: #4caf50;  
color: white; padding: 6px 16px;  
border-radius: 50px; font-size:  
0.9rem; font-weight: 600; margin-  
top: 15px; animation: bounce 1s  
inﬁnite alternate; opacity: 0;  
transform: scale(0.5); transition:  
all 0.5s ease; }  
.detected-badge.show { opacity: 1;  
transform: scale(1); }  
@keyframes bounce { from {  
transform: translateY(0); } to {  
transform: translateY(-5px); } }  
.letter-box { background:  
rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); border-  
radius: 16px; padding: 20px; min-  
height: 250px; max-height: 380px;  
overﬂow-y: auto; text-align: left;  
margin-bottom: 20px; border: 1px  
solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4); box-  
shadow: inset 0 2px 10px  
rgba(0,0,0,0.02); }  
.letter-text { font-size: 1rem; line-  
height: 1.7; color: #34495e; white-  
space: pre-line; font-family:  
'Poppins', sans-serif; }  
.cursor { display: inline-block;  
width: 2px; height: 1.1rem;  
background-color: #ff5e7e;  
margin-left: 2px; animation: blink  
0.8s inﬁnite; vertical-align:  
middle; }  
@keyframes blink { 50% { opacity:  
0; } }  
.heart-pop, .sparkle-pop {  
position: absolute; pointer-events:  
none; animation: ﬂyUp 4s linear  
forwards; color: rgba(255, 94, 126,  
0.7); font-size: 1.5rem; z-index: 2; }  
@keyframes ﬂyUp { 0% {  
transform: translateY(100vh)  
translateX(0) rotate(0deg)  
scale(0.5); opacity: 0; } 10% {  
opacity: 1; } 90% { opacity: 1; }  
100% { transform:  
translateY(-10vh) translateX(var(--  
x-move)) rotate(var(--rot))  
scale(var(--sc)); opacity: 0; } }  
.grand-title { font-size: 3rem; line-  
height: 1.2; margin-bottom: 20px;  
animation: popIn 1s cubic-  
bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275); }  
@keyframes popIn { from {  
transform: scale(0.5); opacity: 0; }  
to { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1;  
} }  
.sub-text { font-size: 1.2rem; font-  
weight: 600; color: #ff416c;  
margin: 8px 0; }  
.signature { margin-top: 30px;  
font-size: 0.95rem; color: #7f8c8d;  
font-weight: 300; }  
.signature strong { color: #ff5e7e;  
font-size: 1.1rem; font-family:  
'Dancing Script', cursive; }  
::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; }  
::-webkit-scrollbar-track {  
background: transparent; }  
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {  
background: rgba(255, 94, 126,  
0.3); border-radius: 10px; }  
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {  
background: rgba(255, 94, 126,  
0.5); }  
</style>  
</head>  
<body>  
<div id="canvas-container"></div>  
<div id="screen-1" class="screen  
active">  
<div class="spinner"></div>  
<div id="loading-text"  
class="searching-text">Searching  
for...</div>  
<h1 style="margin-top: 15px;  
font-size: 2.8rem;">Dr. Sanyogita  
</h1>  
<div id="badge"  
class="detected-badge">Birthday  
Detected </div>  
</div>  
<div id="screen-2" class="screen">  
<h1>Happy Birthday<br>Dr.  
Sanyogita </h1>  
<p>A little surprise made  
especially for you...</p>  
<div class="btn-container">  
<button class="btn btn-  
primary"  
onclick="nextScreen(3)">Open  
Surprise </button>  
</div>  
</div>  
<div id="screen-3" class="screen">  
<h2 style="font-size: 2rem;  
margin-bottom: 10px;">Question  
1</h2>  
<p style="font-weight: 600;  
color: #ff5e7e; font-size:  
1.2rem;">Birthday girl...</p>  
<p>Are you smiling right now?  
</p>  
<div class="btn-container btn-  
row">  
<button class="btn"  
onclick="nextScreen(4)">Yes  
</button>  
<button class="btn"  
onclick="nextScreen(4)">Not yet  
</button>  
</div>  
</div>  
<div id="screen-4" class="screen">  
<h2 style="font-size: 2rem;  
margin-bottom: 10px;">Question  
2</h2>  
<p>Have you made your  
birthday wish yet? </p>  
<div class="btn-container btn-  
row">  
<button class="btn"  
onclick="nextScreen(5)">Yes  
</button>  
<button class="btn"  
onclick="nextScreen(5)">Not yet  
</button>  
</div>  
</div>  
<div id="screen-5" class="screen">  
<h2 style="font-size: 2rem;  
margin-bottom: 10px;">Question  
3</h2>  
<p style="font-weight: 600;  
color: #ff5e7e; font-size:  
1.2rem;">Doctor...</p>  
<p>Can I wish you one more  
Happy Birthday? </p>  
<div class="btn-container btn-  
row" id="q3-btn-container"  
style="position: relative; height:  
120px; width: 100%;">  
<button class="btn" id="btn-  
yes-ﬁxed"  
onclick="nextScreen(6)"  
style="position: absolute; left:  
15%; top: 35px;">Of course  
</button>  
<button class="btn" id="btn-  
no-playful"  
onmouseover="moveNoButton()"  
onclick="handleNoClick()"  
style="position: absolute; right:  
15%; top: 35px;">Why not  
</button>  
</div>  
</div>  
<div id="screen-6"  
class="screen">  
<div class="letter-box">  
<span id="typed-letter"  
class="letter-text"></span><span  
id="letter-cursor" class="cursor">  
</span>  
</div>  
<div class="btn-container"  
id="letter-btn-container"  
style="display: none;">  
<button class="btn btn-  
primary"  
onclick="goToGrandFinale()">Cont  
inue</button>  
</div>  
</div>  
<div id="screen-7" class="screen">  
<h1 class="grand-title">  
Happy Birthday<br>Dr. Sanyogita  
</h1>  
<div class="sub-text">Stay  
happy.</div>  
<div class="sub-text">Stay  
healthy.</div>  
<div class="sub-text">Keep  
smiling.</div>  
<div class="sub-text">Keep  
shining.</div>  
<div class="signature">  
Made with <br>From<br>  
<strong>Mayur </strong>  
</div>  
</div>  
<script>  
let currentScreenIdx = 1;  
const totalScreens = 7;  
let noMoveCount = 0;  
const noButtonTexts = ["Nice try  
", "Catch me ﬁrst ", "Are you  
sure? ", "Think again ", "Not  
today "];  
const letterContent = `Happy  
Birthday, my friend .  
I hope this year brings you endless  
happiness, beautiful memories,  
and lots of reasons to smile...  
other than me.  
(Okay... maybe a few because of  
me too. )  
I hope you achieve everything  
you've worked so hard for.  
I hope every patient leaves with a  
smile because of you.  
I hope you ﬁnd the love of your  
life...  
Then again...  
Why look anywhere else when I'm  
already here?  
Happy Birthday once again,  
Dr. Sanyogita.  
— Mayur `;  
window.addEventListener('DOMC  
ontentLoaded', () => {  
initEffects();  
setTimeout(() => {  
document.getElementById('badge  
').classList.add('show');  
setTimeout(() => {  
nextScreen(2);  
}, 2000);  
}, 2500);  
});  
function nextScreen(screenNum) {  
const currentScreen =  
document.getElementById(`scree  
n-${currentScreenIdx}`);  
const nextScreenObj =  
document.getElementById(`scree  
n-${screenNum}`);  
if (currentScreen) {  
currentScreen.style.opacity =  
'0';  
currentScreen.style.transform  
= 'scale(0.9)';  
currentScreen.classList.remove('a  
ctive');  
}
currentScreenIdx = screenNum;  
setTimeout(() => {  
nextScreenObj.classList.add('activ  
e');  
setTimeout(() => {  
nextScreenObj.style.opacity  
= '1';  
nextScreenObj.style.transform =  
'scale(1)';  
if(screenNum === 6) {  
startTypewriter();  
}
}, 50);  
}, 400);  
}
function moveNoButton() {  
if (noMoveCount >= 5) return;  
const btnNo =  
document.getElementById('btn-  
no-playful');  
const container =  
document.getElementById('q3-  
btn-container');  
const containerWidth =  
container.clientWidth;  
const containerHeight =  
container.clientHeight;  
const btnWidth =  
btnNo.clientWidth;  
const btnHeight =  
btnNo.clientHeight;  
const maxX = containerWidth -  
btnWidth - 20;  
const maxY = containerHeight -  
btnHeight - 10;  
let randomX = Math.max(10,  
Math.ﬂoor(Math.random() *  
maxX));  
let randomY = Math.max(10,  
Math.ﬂoor(Math.random() *  
maxY));  
btnNo.style.left =  
`${randomX}px`;  
btnNo.style.top =  
`${randomY}px`;  
btnNo.innerText =  
noButtonTexts[noMoveCount %  
noButtonTexts.length];  
noMoveCount++;  
if (noMoveCount === 5) {  
setTimeout(() => {  
btnNo.style.position =  
'relative';  
btnNo.style.left = '0';  
btnNo.style.top = '0';  
btnNo.innerText = "Why not  
const btnRow =  
";  
document.createElement('div');  
btnRow.className = 'btn-  
container btn-row';  
btnRow.style.width = '100%';  
btnRow.style.marginTop =  
'0';  
const btnYes =  
document.getElementById('btn-  
yes-ﬁxed');  
btnYes.style.position =  
'relative';  
btnYes.style.left = '0';  
btnYes.style.top = '0';  
container.style.display =  
'none';  
btnRow.appendChild(btnYes);  
btnRow.appendChild(btnNo);  
container.parentNode.appendChil  
d(btnRow);  
}, 800);  
}
}
function handleNoClick() {  
if (noMoveCount >= 5) {  
nextScreen(6);  
}
}
function startTypewriter() {  
const textTarget =  
document.getElementById('typed  
-letter');  
let idx = 0;  
textTarget.innerHTML = '';  
function type() {  
if (idx < letterContent.length) {  
textTarget.innerHTML +=  
letterContent.charAt(idx);  
idx++;  
const box =  
textTarget.parentNode;  
box.scrollTop =  
box.scrollHeight;  
setTimeout(type, 35);  
} else {  
document.getElementById('letter  
-cursor').style.display = 'none';  
document.getElementById('letter  
-btn-container').style.display =  
'ﬂex';  
}
}
setTimeout(type, 500);  
}
function goToGrandFinale() {  
nextScreen(7);  
startGrandCelebration();  
}
let canvas, ctx;  
let ﬁreworks = [];  
let particles = [];  
let confetti = [];  
function initEffects() {  
const container =  
document.getElementById('canva  
s-container');  
canvas =  
document.createElement('canvas'  
);  
canvas.style.position =  
'absolute';  
canvas.style.top = '0';  
canvas.style.left = '0';  
canvas.style.width = '100%';  
canvas.style.height = '100%';  
container.appendChild(canvas);  
ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');  
resizeCanvas();  
window.addEventListener('resize',  
resizeCanvas);  
setInterval(spawnAmbientElemen  
ts, 400);  
requestAnimationFrame(animatio  
nLoop);  
}
function resizeCanvas() {  
canvas.width =  
window.innerWidth;  
canvas.height =  
window.innerHeight;  
}
function  
spawnAmbientElements() {  
if (currentScreenIdx === 7)  
return;  
const container =  
document.getElementById('canva  
s-container');  
if(Math.random() > 0.4) {  
const heart =  
document.createElement('div');  
heart.className = 'heart-pop';  
heart.innerHTML =  
Math.random() > 0.5 ? ' ' : ' ';  
heart.style.left =  
Math.random() * 100 + 'vw';  
heart.style.setProperty('--x-  
move', (Math.random() * 200 -  
100) + 'px');  
heart.style.setProperty('--rot',  
(Math.random() * 360) + 'deg');  
heart.style.setProperty('--sc',  
Math.random() * 0.6 + 0.6);  
heart.style.animationDuration  
= (Math.random() * 2 + 3) + 's';  
container.appendChild(heart);  
setTimeout(() =>  
heart.remove(), 5000);  
} else {  
const sparkle =  
document.createElement('div');  
sparkle.className = 'sparkle-  
pop';  
sparkle.innerHTML = ' ';  
sparkle.style.left =  
Math.random() * 100 + 'vw';  
sparkle.style.setProperty('--x-  
move', (Math.random() * 150 - 75)  
+ 'px');  
sparkle.style.setProperty('--  
rot', (Math.random() * 180) + 'deg');  
sparkle.style.setProperty('--  
sc', Math.random() * 0.4 + 0.5);  
sparkle.style.animationDuration =  
(Math.random() * 2 + 2) + 's';  
container.appendChild(sparkle);  
setTimeout(() =>  
sparkle.remove(), 4000);  
}
}
class Firework {  
constructor() {  
this.x = Math.random() *  
canvas.width;  
this.y = canvas.height;  
this.tx = Math.random() *  
canvas.width;  
this.ty = Math.random() *  
(canvas.height * 0.4) +  
canvas.height * 0.1;  
this.vx = (this.tx - this.x) / 40;  
this.vy = (this.ty - this.y) / 40;  
this.hue = Math.random() *  
360;  
this.done = false;  
}
update() {  
this.x += this.vx;  
this.y += this.vy;  
if (this.vy >= 0 ||  
Math.abs(this.y - this.ty) < 5) {  
this.done = true;  
explodeFirework(this.x,  
this.y, this.hue);  
}
}
draw() {  
ctx.beginPath();  
ctx.arc(this.x, this.y, 3, 0,  
Math.PI * 2);  
ctx.ﬁllStyle = `hsl(${this.hue},  
100%, 70%)`;  
ctx.ﬁll();  
}
}
class Particle {  
constructor(x, y, hue) {  
this.x = x;  
this.y = y;  
this.angle = Math.random() *  
Math.PI * 2;  
this.speed = Math.random() * 5  
+ 2;  
this.vx = Math.cos(this.angle) *  
this.speed;  
this.vy = Math.sin(this.angle) *  
this.speed;  
this.gravity = 0.1;  
this.alpha = 1;  
this.decay = Math.random() *  
0.015 + 0.015;  
this.hue = hue;  
}
update() {  
this.vx *= 0.98;  
this.vy *= 0.98;  
this.vy += this.gravity;  
this.x += this.vx;  
this.y += this.vy;  
this.alpha -= this.decay;  
}
draw() {  
ctx.save();  
ctx.globalAlpha = this.alpha;  
ctx.beginPath();  
ctx.arc(this.x, this.y, 2.5, 0,  
Math.PI * 2);  
ctx.ﬁllStyle = `hsl(${this.hue},  
100%, 60%)`;  
ctx.ﬁll();  
ctx.restore();  
}
}
class Confetti {  
constructor() {  
this.x = Math.random() *  
canvas.width;  
this.y = Math.random() * -50 -  
this.size = Math.random() * 8 +  
10;  
5;  
this.vx = Math.random() * 2 - 1;  
this.vy = Math.random() * 3 + 2;  
this.rotation = Math.random()  
* 360;  
this.rSpeed = Math.random() *  
4 - 2;  
this.color =  
`hsl(${Math.random() * 360},  
100%, 65%)`;  
}
update() {  
this.x += this.vx;  
this.y += this.vy;  
this.rotation += this.rSpeed;  
if (this.y > canvas.height) {  
this.y = -20;  
this.x = Math.random() *  
canvas.width;  
}
}
draw() {  
ctx.save();  
ctx.translate(this.x, this.y);  
ctx.rotate(this.rotation *  
Math.PI / 180);  
ctx.ﬁllStyle = this.color;  
ctx.ﬁllRect(-this.size/2, -  
this.size/2, this.size, this.size);  
ctx.restore();  
}
}
function explodeFirework(x, y,  
hue) {  
for (let i = 0; i < 60; i++) {  
particles.push(new Particle(x,  
y, hue));  
}
}
function startGrandCelebration() {  
for (let i = 0; i < 100; i++) {  
confetti.push(new Confetti());  
}
setInterval(() => {  
if (currentScreenIdx === 7 &&  
ﬁreworks.length < 5) {  
ﬁreworks.push(new  
Firework());  
}
}, 600);  
}
function animationLoop() {  
ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width,  
canvas.height);  
if (currentScreenIdx === 7) {  
for (let i = ﬁreworks.length - 1; i  
>= 0; i--) {  
ﬁreworks[i].update();  
if (ﬁreworks[i].done) {  
ﬁreworks.splice(i, 1);  
} else {  
ﬁreworks[i].draw();  
}
}
for (let i = particles.length - 1; i  
>= 0; i--) {  
particles[i].update();  
if (particles[i].alpha <= 0) {  
particles.splice(i, 1);  
} else {  
particles[i].draw();  
}
}
for (let i = 0; i < confetti.length;  
i++) {  
confetti[i].update();  
confetti[i].draw();  
}
}
requestAnimationFrame(animatio  
nLoop);  
}
</script>  
</body>  
</html>
